---
title: 'Altadena Boundaries and Tracts'
author: "Catalyst California"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(comment = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, echo = FALSE
)

# Library and environment set up ----

library(sf)
library(highcharter)
library(rmapshaper)
library(leaflet)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(tigris)
library(tidycensus)
library(stringr)
library(gt)
library(showtext)
library(extrafont)

options(highcharter.theme = hc_theme_smpl(tooltip = list(valueDecimals = 2)))
options(scipen=999)

source("W:\\RDA Team\\R\\credentials_source.R")

con_alt <- connect_to_db("altadena_recovery_rebuild")
con_rda <- connect_to_db("rda_shared_data")
con_fires <- connect_to_db("la_fires")

# Load in shapes ----
# eaton fire share
eaton_fire <- st_read(con_alt, query="SELECT * FROM data.eaton_fire_prmtr_3310", geom="geom")

eaton_fire_simple <- eaton_fire%>%
    st_transform(4326)

# tract xwalk from la fires project
tracts <- st_read(con_fires, query="SELECT * FROM data.tract_firezone_xwalk where fire_geoid='Eaton'")

# get detailed tract boundaries from tigris
lac_tracts <- tracts("CA",county="Los Angeles",year=2023) 

# Load in census data ----
# load census variables
vars <- load_variables(year = 2022, dataset = "acs5/subject")
vars_dp <- load_variables(2022, "acs5/profile") 

# compared variables used in workbook samples to those in the detailed tables
# Demographics
# DP05_001 Total Population
# DP05_0079P White, non-hispanic %
# DP05_0080P Black, non-hispanic %
# DP03_0119P Families below poverty level %
# DP03_0062 Median household income

# Housing units
# DP04_0001 total housing units
# DP04_0002 total occupied housing units
# DP04_0046 owner occupied
# DP04_0047 renter occupied

# Housing units value
# DP04_0080 value owner-occupied
# DP04_0089 median owner-occupied value
# DP04_0091 with a mortgage of owner-occupied
# DP04_0093 monthly owner costs with mortgage
# DP04_0126 occupied units paying rent
# DP04_0134 median rent

# focus vars for QA
vars_select <- c("DP05_0001",
                 "DP05_0079P",
                "DP05_0080P",
                "DP03_0119P",
                "DP03_0062",
                "DP04_0001",
                "DP04_0002",
                "DP04_0046",
                "DP04_0047",
                "DP04_0080",
                "DP04_0089",
                "DP04_0091",
                "DP04_0093",
                "DP04_0126",
                "DP04_0134")

# data dictionary trimmed
vars_dp_select <- vars_dp %>% filter(name %in% vars_select)

# pull data from tidycensus
tract_data <- get_acs(geography = "tract", survey = "acs5", state = "CA",
                      variables = vars_select, 
                       year = 2022, geometry = FALSE) 

# Pull CHAS data ----


```

```{r altadena-data}

# Get data for altadena tracts and clean up a full dataframe
# filter for altadena tracts and join the prc fields from the xwalk
altadena_tracts <- lac_tracts %>% filter(GEOID %in% tracts$tract_geoid) %>%
  select(GEOID,NAME) %>%
    st_transform(4326) %>%
  left_join(tracts %>% select(tract_geoid, prc_tract_area, prc_fire_area), by=c("GEOID"="tract_geoid"))

# filter for altadena tracts and pivot
altadena_tract_data <- tract_data %>% filter(GEOID %in% altadena_tracts$GEOID) %>% select(-moe)%>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols=GEOID,names_from=variable,
              values_from=estimate)

# join to shapes and the prc intersect to get one dataframe for altadena
altadena_tracts <- altadena_tracts %>% left_join(altadena_tract_data)

# let's filter to tracts within at least 10% of the fire boundary 
altadena_tracts_subset <- altadena_tracts %>% filter(prc_tract_area>=.10) 

```




```{r altadena=map}

# map tracts and check boundaries
leaflet () %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addPolygons(data=eaton_fire_simple,
              fillColor="red",
              fillOpacity=0.7,
              color="white",
              weight=1,
              popup=~fire_name,
              group="Eaton Fire Perimeter") %>%
  
    addPolygons(data=altadena_tracts_subset,
              fillColor="yellow",
              fillOpacity=0.7,
              color="black",
              weight=2,
              popup=~paste0(altadena_tracts_subset$GEOID, "<br>",
                            altadena_tracts_subset$prc_tract_area, "<br>",
                            altadena_tracts_subset$prc_fire_area, "<br>"),
              group="Census Tracts") %>%
  
  addLayersControl(
          overlayGroups = c("Eaton Fire Perimeter", "Census Tracts"),
        options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
  )
      
# add an indicator for west/east of lake avenue  and clean up table
altadena_tracts_subset <- altadena_tracts_subset %>%
  mutate(location=ifelse(GEOID %in% c("06037460301","06037460200","06037461100","06037461000","06037460302"), "West of Lake Ave", "East of Lake Ave")) %>%
  select(GEOID,NAME,location,everything())%>%
  mutate(prc_tract_area=100*as.numeric(prc_tract_area),
         prc_fire_area=100*prc_fire_area) %>%
    rename(geoid=GEOID,
         tract=NAME)


```


```{r styling}

### Table styling ----
## COLORS ##
papaya <- "#F25922"
peridot <- "#CEEA01"
lavender <- "#CEC4E2"
meteorite <- "#3A207D"
ccblue <- "#0860BC"

black <- "#000000"
alabaster<-"#FBFBFB"
gainsboro <- "#DEDEDE"

## FONTS ## 

font_add_google("Inter")

# font_import()
loadfonts(device = "win")
windowsFonts()
showtext_auto()

```

```{r census-intersect-table}

### Step 1: Trim table and clean up columns ---
# select columns
col_select <- c("tract","location","prc_tract_area")
order_col <- "prc_tract_area"
dict <- c("%_tract_in_fire_area"="prc_tract_area")
title_text <- "Altadena Census Tracts by Location and Fire Perimeter"
footer_text <- "Catalyst California's calculations based on Eaton Fire Perimeter from January 2025"

# table_function <- function(df,col_select,order_col,dict, title_text, footer_text) {
#   
# }
#   
df<-altadena_tracts_subset %>%
  select(all_of(col_select)) %>%
  st_drop_geometry()%>%
  arrange(desc(location),!! rlang::sym(order_col))

df <- df %>%
  rename(!!!dict) %>%
  rename_with(~ gsub("_", " ", .)) %>%  
  rename_with(str_to_title) %>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits = 1)


table<-df %>%
  gt()%>%
  # title
  tab_header(title=glue::glue(title_text))%>%
  # any data notes in footer
  tab_footnote(footnote=footer_text,placement="left") %>%
  # column widths
 cols_width(
    everything() ~ px(150)  # set maximum column width
  ) %>%
  opt_align_table_header("center")%>%
  opt_table_font(font=c(google_font(name="Inter"),locations=NULL,default_fonts()))%>%
  tab_options(table.background.color=alabaster,
    column_labels.background.color = "transparent",
    table.font.size = px(12),
    column_labels.font.size = px(12),
    heading.align = "center",
    table.font.names = "Inter",
    heading.title.font.size = px(18),
    heading.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.bottom.width = px(3),
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = gainsboro,
    table.border.top.color = "transparent",
    table.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    table.border.bottom.width = px(1),
    data_row.padding = px(1),
    footnotes.font.size = px(10),
    footnotes.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    table.align='left')%>%
  tab_style(style=
            cell_borders(sides=c("top","bottom"),color=gainsboro,style="solid",weight=px(1)),locations=cells_body())%>%
   tab_style(style=
            cell_text(font=c(google_font(name="Inter"),default_fonts()),weight=900),locations=cells_title()) %>%
  tab_style(style=
            cell_text(color=meteorite, font=c(google_font(name="Inter"),default_fonts())),locations=cells_body()) %>%
  opt_css(
    css = "
      .gt_title {
        line-height: 1.1;      /* Controls line spacing */
        margin-bottom: 0px;    /* Removes extra spacing after title */
        padding-bottom: 2px;   /* Optional: adjust as needed */
      }
    "
  )

table

gtsave(table, filename="tracts_fire_perimeter.png", path = "W:\\Project\\RDA Team\\Altadena Recovery and Rebuild\\Deliverables\\Memo")

```

``` {r census-data}



```
